name: Victorian Lace Sleeve Blazer
description: Black lace blazer with dramatic velvet sleeves and a fur lined V-neck. Captures an edgy goth style while also having Victorian inspiration through the leather buckles.

name: Claw Hand Accessory
description: Metallic claw-shaped hand glove with spikes, perfect for dramatic goth looks. Sharp edges and adjustable fit make it a fierce statement for nights out.

name: Wide Brim Black
description: Oversized black felt hat with fringe sleeve styling, ideal for alternative fashion. This wide brim provides a mysterious silhouette, especially good for foggy days.

name: Embroidered Hooded Scarf
description: Dark embroidered hood-scarf with fur cuffs, giving off a mystical forest vibe. Delicate stitching evokes enchanted woods, wrapping you in romantic layers.

name: Chain Necklace Set
description: Layered chain necklaces and harness style for goth layering. Multiple strands create versatile texture, elevating any outfit to look more alternative.

name: Victorian Trench Coat
description: Victorian-inspired trench coat with leather details and metal buttons. Soft fabric and structured silhouette blend romance with subtlety for a timeless look.

name: Collared Bat Blouse
description: This button down blouse blends gothic elements with office attire, allowed for self expression even at work. The design includes metal buttons, a bat collar and leather details.

name: Waist Corset
description: Waist corset can be added to any blouse or dress for a more fitted shape. Not only does it function for a better fit but also adds an edge to any outfit.

name: Bell Sleeved Lace Blouse
description: Simple black lace blouse with clean lines for versatile goth styling. The delicate layers are not flashy yet add depth and personality to an outfit.

name: Layered Tulle Dress
description: Multi-layer black tulle dress with dramatic details including fur, lace and mesh. The ethereal dress flows with bold hems, perfect for a haunted evening of romance.

name: Romantic Goth Dress
description: Lace-trimmed gothic dress with corset waist and beautiful draping fabric. Sweet ruffles and defined shaping create regal, doll-like silhouette.

name: Victorian Dress
description: High-neck lace dress with off the shoulder sleeves and hoop-skirt inspired skirt. Ornate collars and flared tiers channel elegant mourning attire from bygone eras.

name: Asymetrical Dress
description: Short tiered dress with an asymetrical look to set you apart. This dress's mesh details are shown off by its simple structure focused on the bottom hem.

name: Wilted Rose Dress
description: Classic black dress holding, with puffed sleeves and lace cuffs. Lacey motifs add more details to its vintage charm.

name: Forest Corset Dress
description: An off the shoulder gown with a tiered skirt giving off a dark romantic forest theme. Three different colors of lace details draws inspiration from romantic goth aesthetics.

name: Red Velvet Dress
description: A velvet dress perfect for the colder months when you want to be warm yet still stylish. This dress is also one of our most comfortable due to the materials and looser structure!
